project_type: Next.js 16 multi-tenant SaaS CRM with modular architecture
test_framework: Vitest with unit tests in tests/unit/. Tests use vi.mock() for DB/external deps. Many test files excluded in vitest.config.ts.
verification_instructions: 1. npx tsc --noEmit (must be 0 errors), 2. npm test (253+ tests pass, 2 pre-existing failures from missing PostgreSQL/backup dir are acceptable), 3. npm run build (production build must succeed)
setup_instructions: npm install (already done). No database available in sandbox.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Node.js v22. No PostgreSQL database running - DB-dependent integration tests will fail (expected). No Docker daemon needed for validation.
contribution_requirements: TypeScript strict mode. Zod v4 for validation. Drizzle ORM for schema. All API routes use requireAuth() middleware. Module system uses requireModule()/requireFeature() gates. Every new settings page needs loading.tsx and error.tsx.
key_patterns: API routes: app/api/tenant/[resource]/route.ts with GET/POST/PUT/DELETE. Auth: requireAuth(req) returns AuthContext|NextResponse. Schema: drizzle/schema/*.ts with pgTable using utils.pk(), utils.tenantId(), utils.lifecycle(). Validation: validateBody(schema, body). Module gating: requireModule(ctx.tenantId, moduleId). Tests: mock @/drizzle/db, @/drizzle/schema/*, drizzle-orm, then test exported functions.
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js app router (api/, superadmin/, tenant/). lib/ - Business logic modules. drizzle/schema/ - 18 schema files with 160+ tables. tests/unit/ - 38 test files. types/ - Shared TypeScript types. components/ - React UI components.
